perksWithImages.name: Bamboozle
perksWithImages.description:
Whenever you vault a Window, it is blocked for Survivors for {Tunable.K12P01.WindowBlockDurations}s.

You basic-vault Windows {Tunable.K12P01.WindowVaultSpeed%}% faster.

Only 1 Window can be blocked at a time.

perksWithImages.name: Empathy
perksWithImages.description: Within {Tunable.S03P01.AuraRevealDistance}m, you see the Auras of injured Survivors.

perksWithImages.name: Oppression
perksWithImages.description: Whenever you damage a Generator, up to {Tunable.K22P02.AffectedGenerators} other Generators start regressing. Survivors repairing them get a special Skill Check. Cooldown: {Tunable.K22P02.Cooldown}s.

perksWithImages.name: We're Gonna Live Forever
perksWithImages.description:
You heal downed Survivors {Tunable.S10P01.HealSpeedIncrease%}% faster.

Whenever you finish healing a downed Survivor, they gain {Keyword.Endurance} for {Tunable.S10P01.EnduranceDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.S10P01.EnduranceCooldownDuration}s.
